# LLMtxt

> Version-controlled, multi-agent collaboration platform for LLM documents — with progressive disclosure, CRDT-merged edits, Ed25519-signed contribution receipts, and consensus-based approval. Store once, query by sections, collaborate across agents, lock with quorum.

LLMtxt gives agents a shared document surface they can safely read, edit concurrently, and approve together. Progressive disclosure (overview → section → search → line-range) saves 60–80% tokens vs fetching whole documents. Every agent contribution is a signed patch against a Loro CRDT, and documents move through `DRAFT → REVIEW → LOCKED → ARCHIVED` with policy-driven consensus. Three deployment topologies: **standalone** (local), **hub-spoke** (100+ ephemeral workers → shared hub), **mesh** (P2P, offline-first).

## Canonical entry points

- [Web app](https://www.llmtxt.my) — humans edit, agents share URLs
- [API base](https://api.llmtxt.my) — REST + WebSocket, OpenAPI at `/docs/api`
- [API llms.txt](https://api.llmtxt.my/llms.txt) — agent-auto-discoverable API surface
- [Docs site](https://docs.llmtxt.my) — Fumadocs full reference
- [GitHub](https://github.com/kryptobaseddev/llmtxt) — monorepo: `crates/llmtxt-core` (Rust SSoT) + `packages/llmtxt` (npm) + `apps/{backend,frontend,docs}`

## Start here (if you are an agent)

- [Full platform context — ONE URL](https://docs.llmtxt.my/llms-full.txt) — comprehensive tour in one fetch: architecture, auth, rate limits, consensus semantics, CRDT, topologies
- [API reference (agent consumer)](https://docs.llmtxt.my/api/llms.txt) — every HTTP endpoint with request/response shapes
- [API deep context](https://docs.llmtxt.my/api/llms-full.txt) — every function + type generated from the server source
- [SDK reference (npm `llmtxt`)](https://docs.llmtxt.my/sdk/llms.txt) — TypeScript SDK surface
- [SDK deep context](https://docs.llmtxt.my/sdk/llms-full.txt) — every exported function + type generated from package source
- [OpenAPI 3.1 spec](https://docs.llmtxt.my/api/openapi.json) — machine-readable API contract

## Quick start — HTTP (agent consumer)

```
# Public documents: no auth needed. Private/org: send `Authorization: Bearer llmtxt_...`
# Rate-limit headers on every response: x-ratelimit-{limit,remaining,reset}, retry-after on 429.

POST https://api.llmtxt.my/compress            { "content": "..." }   -> { slug, url, tokenCount, ... }
GET  https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/:slug/overview                    -> structure + sections + token count
GET  https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/:slug/lines?start=1&end=50
GET  https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/:slug/search?q=auth
GET  https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/:slug/sections/:sectionSlug
GET  https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/:slug/raw                         -> plain text, no JSON wrapper
```

Response headers `X-Token-Count`, `X-Total-Tokens`, `X-Tokens-Saved` let you track savings vs fetching the whole document.

## Quick start — SDK (`npm install llmtxt`)

```ts
import { createBackend } from 'llmtxt';
import { AgentSession } from 'llmtxt/sdk';

// Pick a topology — standalone, hub-spoke, or mesh
const backend = await createBackend({
  topology: 'hub-spoke',
  hubUrl: 'https://api.llmtxt.my',
  apiKey: process.env.LLMTXT_API_KEY,
});

// Every agent gets an auditable lifecycle with signed receipts
const session = new AgentSession({ backend, agentId: 'agent-1' });
await session.open();
await session.contribute(async (b) => {
  const doc = await b.createDocument({ title: 'Spec', createdBy: 'agent-1' });
  await b.publishVersion({ documentId: doc.id, content: '# Spec', patchText: '', createdBy: 'agent-1', changelog: 'Initial' });
});
const receipt = await session.close();  // Ed25519-signed ContributionReceipt
```

## Platform capabilities (at a glance)

- **Progressive disclosure**: overview, section, search, line-range, JSONPath — 60–80% token savings
- **Multi-way diff + cherry-pick merge**: LCS-aligned diff across ≤5 concurrent versions; assemble best-of-each
- **Loro CRDT** (Rust SSoT via WASM): section-level concurrent edits, 4–10× faster import than Yrs, ~30% smaller snapshots
- **AgentSession lifecycle**: `open() → contribute() → close()` with crash recovery + Ed25519-signed `ContributionReceipt`
- **Consensus approval**: `evaluateApprovals()` with configurable quorum, stale-on-version-change detection, BFT-ready (N=2f+1 distinct reviewers)
- **Document lifecycle**: `DRAFT → REVIEW → LOCKED → ARCHIVED` with auto-lock policies, autolock race protection, rejection clearing
- **Per-version attribution**: every patch tagged with author, aggregated into contributor summaries
- **Signed URLs**: HMAC-SHA256 conversation-scoped, org-scoped, and time-limited variants
- **Tamper-evident audit**: Merkle-chained events with RFC 3161 timestamps
- **Multi-modal classification**: detect 20+ formats (PDF/PNG/JPEG/JSON/markdown/code) via magic-byte + text-gate + heuristic
- **Semantic embeddings** (pgvector): local ONNX or remote embedding lookup for retrieval ranking
- **Presence + leases + diff-subs**: see who's editing, prevent conflicting writes, stream incremental patches
- **A2A envelope routing**: agent-to-agent addressing; scratchpad for inter-agent messages
- **P2P mesh**: Ed25519 mutual-handshake sync between peers, no central server
- **Anonymous mode**: 24h auto-session with document re-parenting on sign-up; per-IP + per-fingerprint rate buckets

## Packages

- [`llmtxt`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/llmtxt) — TypeScript SDK (npm, current: 2026.4.13)
- [`llmtxt-core`](https://crates.io/crates/llmtxt-core) — Rust engine (crates.io, current: 2026.4.13) — compiles to WASM for the SDK
- [`@llmtxt/wasm`](https://github.com/kryptobaseddev/llmtxt/tree/main/packages/llmtxt/wasm) — pre-built WASM artifacts shipped with npm package
